title: Skill India Mission Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Skill India Mission Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Subject Matter Expert in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
